'''sasaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seaburger|seaburger]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-s-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seaburger|seaburger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sasaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæsæjæth|sæsæjæth]] || [[word:sæsæjæj|sæsæjæj]] || [[word:sæsæjæsh|sæsæjæsh]] || [[word:sæsæjæ|sæsæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sasasajath|sasasajath]] || [[word:sasasajaj|sasasajaj]] || [[word:sasasajash|sasasajash]] || [[word:sasasaja|sasasaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sasajath|sasajath]] || [[word:sasajaj|sasajaj]] || [[word:sasajash|sasajash]] || [[word:sasaja|sasaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sasafjath|sasafjath]] || [[word:sasafjaj|sasafjaj]] || [[word:sasafjash|sasafjash]] || [[word:sasafjaf|sasafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sasajatha|sasajatha]] || [[word:sasajaja|sasajaja]] || [[word:sasajasha|sasajasha]] || [[word:sasajaka|sasajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sasajath|sasajath]] || [[word:sasajaj|sasajaj]] || [[word:sasajash|sasajash]] || [[word:sasaja|sasaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sasajathal|sasajathal]] || [[word:sasajajal|sasajajal]] || [[word:sasajashal|sasajashal]] || [[word:sasajakal|sasajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sasajathatha|sasajathatha]] || [[word:sasajajaja|sasajajaja]] || [[word:sasajashasha|sasajashasha]] || [[word:sasajaka|sasajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sasajathan|sasajathan]] || [[word:sasajajan|sasajajan]] || [[word:sasajashan|sasajashan]] || [[word:sasajakan|sasajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sasajathaoro|sasajathaoro]] || [[word:sasajajaoro|sasajajaoro]] || [[word:sasajashaoro|sasajashaoro]] || [[word:sasajakaoro|sasajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
